---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(plasticGeo)
```

```{r}
#| eval: fasle
top_plastic_items(nigeria_data, neighborhood = "Agege", n = 3)
```

> This function will take in a neighborhood in Nigeria out of the 6 neighborhoods we have data on and output the top 3 plastic items and counts for each type of plastic item.
